name: Study Planner shows weekly calendar with navigation
description: The planner page displays a 7-day weekly calendar grid with day headers and navigation arrows to move between weeks.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the Study Planner link in the sidebar
Verify the page displays a weekly calendar with 7 day columns showing day names (Mon, Tue, Wed, etc.) and navigation buttons for previous and next week
Click the Next week navigation button
Verify the displayed date range changes to show the following week's dates
